title: DialogOpenProjectFolderMethod
description: Contract for dialog.openProjectFolder. ELECTRON-HANDLED ONLY — this method is intercepted by Electron main and never forwarded to the Go core. It opens the native macOS/Windows folder picker for selecting a project directory.

DialogOpenProjectFolderRequest.title: DialogOpenProjectFolderRequest
DialogOpenProjectFolderRequest.description: No params needed for the dialog.

DialogOpenProjectFolderResponse.title: DialogOpenProjectFolderResponse
DialogOpenProjectFolderResponse.description: The selected folder path, or null if the user dismissed the dialog.

path.description: Absolute path chosen by the user, or null if cancelled
